zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne於1120年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉時，她的父親Henri de Fougères34歲，母親Olive de Penthièvre34歲。她和Osmond Chaumont II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1175年在法國皮卡迪奧易享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Frangal
meanings: Gaelic: A Gaelic form of Frances.

nameMeanings.name: de

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne was born in 1120, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Henri de Fougères, was 34 and her mother, Olive de Penthièvre, was 34. She had at least 1 son with Osmond Chaumont II. She died in 1175, in Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne est née en 1120, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Henri de Fougères, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Olive de Penthièvre, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Osmond Chaumont II. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne 1120 in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri de Fougères 34 und ihre Mutter Olive de Penthièvre 34. Sie hatte mit Osmond Chaumont II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne è nata il nel 1120 nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Henri de Fougères, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Olive de Penthièvre, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Osmond Chaumont II. Morì nel 1175, nel Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagneが1120年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインで生まれた時，父Henri de Fougèresは34歳，母Olive de Penthièvreは34歳であった。彼女はOsmond Chaumont IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1175年にフランスピカーディオイゼで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne(이)가 1120년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri de Fougères(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olive de Penthièvre(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Osmond Chaumont II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 프랑스 피카디 이스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne nasceu em 1120, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Henri de Fougères, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Olive de Penthièvre, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Osmond Chaumont II. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Oise, Picardie, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne родилась в 1120 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri de Fougères было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Olive de Penthièvre, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Osmond Chaumont II. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne nació en 1120, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Henri de Fougères, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Olive de Penthièvre, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Osmond Chaumont II. Murió en 1175, en Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
